data.content: Shipment review: APPROVED. Both implementation commits live on main (704c9e17569e: Fix scanned settings model selectors; 7b036a815d4a: fix(settings): normalize imported agent model ids). agent-config-normalization.ts (147 lines) canonicalizes Claude model IDs (dots→hyphens) at scan, detect, load, save, and doctor/backfill paths. CI green (all success). No invariants on this knot. No regressions detected. All commit tags confirmed.
